channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From Wisconsin's Dominant Big Ten Win Over Michigan State
item.description: Nick Boyd scored 29 points and shot 5-of-7 from 3-point range as Wisconsin trounced No. 10 Michigan State 92-71 on Friday night.

item.title: bet365 Bonus Code FOX365 Unlocks $150 in Bonus Bets for NBA All-Star Weekend
item.description: bet365 Bonus Code FOX365 Unlocks $150 in Bonus Bets for NBA All-Star Weekend.

item.title: Tony Stewart on Racing NASCAR Trucks Again After Daytona Crash: 'Never Say Never'
item.description: Tony Stewart's return to NASCAR ended with a wreck in the Truck Series season opener at Daytona.

item.title: England Legend Michael Owen Gives Harry Kane Advice Ahead of 2026 World Cup
item.description: Michael Owen has delivered tactical advice to Harry Kane and England manager Thomas Tuchel.

item.title: NBA All Star Weekend Odds: How to Bet on the 3-Point Contest, Slam Dunk Contest, and Rising Star
item.description: NBA All Star Weekend Odds: How to Bet on the 3-Point Contest, Slam Dunk Contest, and Rising Star.

item.title: Win projections for all 30 MLB teams -- and how the offseason changed expectations
item.description: Fans love a big splash but don't always get one. Here's what some non-moves mean for each team's playoff forecast.

item.title: Offseason grades for every big move
item.description: We've got you covered with grades and analysis on every winter signing and big offseason trade.

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Man City, Chelsea want Brentford's Igor Thiago
item.description: Man City, Chelsea and Bayern Munich are tracking Brenford's Igor Thiago, while Man United look to move on AndrÃ© Onana. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Wroblewski calls out officiating after chippy U.S. win
item.description: Abbey Murphy was once again in the middle of the action, drawing and taking penalties as the U.S. women's hockey team cruised to a 6-0 win over Italy ...

item.title: 'I blew it': Malinin falls twice in Olympic shocker
item.description: American sensation "Quad God" Ilia Malinin fell twice in a disastrous free skate Friday night, allowing Kazakhstan's Mikhail Shaidorov to claim a stun...
